title: bulbophyllum epicranthes
intro: Bulbophyllum epicranthes, also known as the helmet orchid, is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Asia and Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include the presence of flavonoids and alkaloids that have been shown to exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of bulbophyllum epicranthes are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory infections, and alleviate pain. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared by making a decoction of the roots, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, including coughs, colds, and sore throats.
